scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run --cwd backend dev" "sh -c 'if lsof -ti:5173 >/dev/null; then echo [frontend] port 5173 already in use, skipping start.; else bun run --cwd frontend dev; fi'"
scripts.dev:elysia: concurrently "bun run --cwd backend dev:elysia" "sh -c 'if lsof -ti:5173 >/dev/null; then echo [frontend] port 5173 already in use, skipping start.; else bun run --cwd frontend dev; fi'"
scripts.install:all: bun install && bun install --cwd backend && bun install --cwd frontend
